name: Young White Dragon
speed: 40 ft., Burrow 20 ft., Fly 80 ft., Swim 40 ft.

traits.name: Ice Walk
traits.text: The dragon can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, Difficult Terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

text:
# Young White Dragon

*Large Dragon (Chromatic), Chaotic Evil*

### Actions

**Rend.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) Slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) Cold damage.

**Cold Breath (Recharge 5–6).** Constitution Saving Throw: DC 15, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 40 (9d8) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.
